description: Junction table linking episodic memory events to semantic knowledge facts. Enables tracing which decisions contributed to which learned knowledge.

columns.description: Primary column — short description of the relationship between the episodic event and semantic knowledge.
Reference to the episodic memory event that contributed to this knowledge.
Reference to the semantic knowledge fact derived from the episodic event.
How the episodic event contributed to the semantic knowledge.
How much this episodic event changed the confidence of the linked semantic knowledge. Positive values reinforce, negative values weaken.
Timestamp when this episodic-to-semantic link was established by the knowledge promotion flow.

alternateKeys.name: cr_episodic_semantic_key
alternateKeys.description: Prevents duplicate links between the same episodic event and semantic knowledge fact.

notes.design_rationale: Many-to-many junction table. A single user decision (episodic event) can contribute to multiple knowledge facts, and a single knowledge fact can be derived from multiple events. The contribution type and confidence impact enable the learning system to track knowledge provenance.
notes.retention: Rows are deleted when either the parent episodic memory or semantic knowledge row is deleted (cascade delete via Dataverse relationship configuration).
notes.security: Table uses UserOwned ownership type. Row-level security is inherited — users can only see links between their own episodic and semantic records.
